videoSnippet.title: Still Prep! || Nikolas Theodorou vs Ding Liren || FIDE World Rapid Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Theodorou, Nikolas (2600) - Ding, Liren (2716) *
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.06.17 D38 
Queen's Gambit Declined, Ragozin variation   

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 Bb4 5.Qb3 c5 6.dxc5 Nc6 7.Bg5 Qa5 8.Bxf6 dxc4 9.Qxc4 gxf6 10.Rc1 Qxc5 11.Qf4 Ke7 12.g3 e5 13.Qh6 Bxc3+ 14.bxc3 e4 15.Nd2 e3 16.Qxf6+ Kxf6 17.Ne4+ Ke7 18.Nxc5 b6 19.Nd3 Be6 20.fxe3 Rac8 21.Bg2 Na5 22.Nb4 Rc5 23.Rf1 Nc4 24.Rf4 Nxe3 25.Bb7 Rc7 26.Bf3 a5 27.Nc6+ Kf8 28.Rb1 Nd5 29.Bxd5 Bxd5 30.Nd4 Rb7 31.Rf6 Bxa2 32.Rbxb6 Rxb6 33.Rxb6 Ke7 34.Ra6 Rc8 35.Rxa5 Bb1 36.Kd2 Bg6 37.g4 h6 38.h4 Kf6 39.Ra6+ Kg7 40.h5 Be4 41.Nf5+ Bxf5 42.gxf5 Rd8+ 43.Ke3 Re8+ 44.Kd3 Rd8+ 45.Kc4 Re8 46.f6+ Kg8 47.Ra2 Re6 48.Kb5 Re5+ 49.Kb6 Rxh5 50.c4 Rh1 51.Rb2 Rc1 52.c5 h5 53.c6 Kh7 54.c7 h4 55.Rb5 h3 56.Rh5+ Kg6 57.Rxh3 Kxf6 58.Rh8 Ke6
